description: The system has flagged that a passenger appears to have two identical bookings. An agent must investigate and resolve the issue.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the two flagged bookings and confirm they are for the same passenger on the same flight.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies that the bookings are duplicates.

nodes.task_description: Contact the passenger to ask which booking they would like to keep.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates with the passenger to understand their intent.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the unwanted booking and process a refund according to the fare rules.

expected_outcome.value: Agent cancels one booking and processes any applicable refund.
